p.strong: 10 component types × independent add/remove = 2¹⁰ = 1,024 potential archetypes

div.p: ⚠️ FRAGMENTATION WARNING 100,000 entities ÷ 1,024 archetypes = ~97 entities per archetype Small tables → cache misses jumping between archetypes
Each component can be independently added/removed
All archetypes have similar size (~97 entities) → No "hot" archetypes to optimize → Uniform fragmentation
Combine components that always appear together Health + MaxHealth → HealthStats
Use sparse sets for rarely-used components PlayerControlled (0.1% entities)
